data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces decision-making time by limiting choices on search result pages.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist interface, clear categorization, relevant suggestions

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designed fast interaction for navigation elements to be easily selectable.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas, toolbars, easy-to-reach buttons

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Groups content into manageable chunks for easier processing by users.
data.technical_spec: Clustering search results, expandable menus, predictive search

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Offers a familiar experience by adhering to common web conventions.
data.technical_spec: Consistent layout with other web services, recognizable icons, standard navigation

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Achieves a balance between aesthetics and functionality to increase user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Responsive UI design, Google Material Design principles, adaptive color schemes
